nasb.text: and he entered into the Praetorium again and *said to Jesus, “Where are You from?” But Jesus gave him no answer.

esv.text: He entered his headquarters again and said to Jesus, “Where are you from?” But Jesus gave him no answer.

cnv.text: 又進了官邸，問耶穌：“你究竟是從哪裡來的？”耶穌卻不回答他。

ccb.text: 连忙将耶稣带回总督府，问祂：“你到底是从哪里来的？”但耶稣没有回答。

csbs.text: 又进了总督府，问耶稣：“你到底是从哪里来的？”耶稣却没有回答他。
